title: Romantic German Sausage Dinner
description: A hearty German-inspired sausage dinner to impress your loved one. Serve with a side of sauerkraut or braised red cabbage.

ingredients.name: fold
ingredients.amount: 1 cup of braising liquid (beer or beef broth)

instructions: Heat buttery in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until it's translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the sliced red bell pepper and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Add the German sausages and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the braising liquid and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Transfer the skillet to the oven and braise the sausages at 300°F for 20-25 minutes.
Serve the sausages hot with the braised vegetables and a side of sauerkraut or braised red cabbage.
Garnish with fresh parsley or thyme if desired.
